channel.title: Failure to use react-awesome-slider
channel.description:
``` Error: ./node_modules/react-awesome-slider/src/core/styles.scss 1:0 Module parse failed: Unexpected character '@' (1:0) You may need an appropriate loader to handle this file type, currently no loaders are configured to process this file. See https://webpack.js.org/concepts#loaders > @import './constants.scss'; | | %fill-parent { @ ./node_modules/react-awesome-slider/src/styles.js 1:0-39 1:54-60 @ ./packages/my-first-theme/src/components/MainBody/Content/Slider.js @ ./packages/my-first-theme/src/components/MainBody/Content/Content.js @ ./packages/my-first-theme/src/components/MainBody/MainBody.js @ ./packages/my-first-theme/src/components/index.js @ ./packages/my-first-theme/src/index.js @ ./build/bundling/entry-points/www.datalibstar.com/client.ts @ multi webpack-hot-middleware/client ./build/bundling/entry-points/www.datalibstar.com/client.ts ```
who can help me?

item.title: Failure to use react-awesome-slider
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @12732801

I’m afraid you’ll have to share more info about your issue so anyone in the Community can help you with it.

Please have a look at the Forum User’s Guide to learn more about the best ways to Get Help with your Frontity project

Read full topic

item.title: Failure to use react-awesome-slider
item.description:
Error: ./node_modules/react-awesome-slider/src/core/styles.scss 1:0
Module parse failed: Unexpected character '@' (1:0)
You may need an appropriate loader to handle this file type, currently no loaders are configured to process this file. See https://webpack.js.org/concepts#loaders
> @import './constants.scss';
|
| %fill-parent {
 @ ./node_modules/react-awesome-slider/src/styles.js 1:0-39 1:54-60
 @ ./packages/my-first-theme/src/components/MainBody/Content/Slider.js
 @ ./packages/my-first-theme/src/components/MainBody/Content/Content.js
 @ ./packages/my-first-theme/src/components/MainBody/MainBody.js
 @ ./packages/my-first-theme/src/components/index.js
 @ ./packages/my-first-theme/src/index.js
 @ ./build/bundling/entry-points/www.datalibstar.com/client.ts
 @ multi webpack-hot-middleware/client ./build/bundling/entry-points/www.datalibstar.com/client.ts

who can help me?

Read full topic
